inputs.titre: Necker est renvoyé par Louis XVI

reason: The image depicts a scene with Louis XVI dismissing Necker in what appears to be a stone-walled chamber. The clothing, inkwell, candles, and stone architecture are consistent with the late 18th-century setting. The lighting and overall atmosphere also align well with the historical context. However, the hairstyle of Necker is very modern and the style of coat he wears is out of time period. The desk is too clean and modern as well. Overall it is okay, but definitely not perfect.
